import json, os, glob, sys, textwrap, unicodedata, re, difflib, statistics

# Load the files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-MVgj1ZkxaQMvFkdZLobLET-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Ly1VfrnGpghzcoaXtbANNv-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadiths)

# Normalization utilities according to instructions
arabic_diacritics = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + '\u0670' + '\u0640'

def strip_diacritics(text):
    # remove tashkeel and tatweel
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in text if ch not in arabic_diacritics)
    # remove other combining marks
    text = ''.join(c for c in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', text) if unicodedata.category(c) != 'Mn')
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)
    return text

def normalize_hamza(text):
    # unify hamza forms: أ إ آ ؤ ئ to ا or appropriate?
    # We'll map all hamza-on-carrier to bare alif for search
    replacements = {
        'أ':'ا', 'إ':'ا', 'آ':'ا',
        'ؤ':'و', 'ئ':'ي', 'ء':'ء', 'ة':'ه',
        'ى':'ي', 'ٰ':'', 'ٱ':'ا',
    }
    return ''.join(replacements.get(ch, ch) for ch in text)

def clean_text(text):
    text = text.lower()
    text = strip_diacritics(text)
    text = normalize_hamza(text)
    # remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute length of LCS for small texts
    # convert to tokens maybe
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    n, m = len(a_tokens), len(b_tokens)
    dp = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            if a_tokens[i] == b_tokens[j]:
                dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j] + 1
            else:
                dp[i+1][j+1] = max(dp[i][j+1], dp[i+1][j])
    return dp[n][m]

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_set = collections.Counter(a.split())
    b_set = collections.Counter(b.split())
    common = sum((a_set & b_set).values())
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / sum(a_set.values())
    recall = common / sum(b_set.values())
    return 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)

def normalized_similarity(a, b):
    # combine token_f1 and ratio of LCS tokens
    a_clean = clean_text(a)
    b_clean = clean_text(b)
    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_length(a_clean, b_clean)
    lcs_ratio = 2 * lcs / (len(a_clean.split()) + len(b_clean.split()))
    f1 = token_f1(a_clean, b_clean)
    # combine
    return (lcs_ratio + f1) / 2

# Test normalization quickly
text = "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ"
clean_text(text)

# Inspect keys

kw = "الإجهاض"
sum(1 for a in quran if clean_text(kw) in clean_text(a.get('ayah_text','')))

target_phrases = [
    "السمع والطاعة على المرء المسلم",
    "إذا أمر بمعصية فلا سمع ولا طاعة",
    "ما لم يؤمر بمعصية",
    "لا طاعة لمخلوق في معصية الخالق",
    "لا طاعة لبشر في معصية الله",
]
candidates = []
for rec in hadiths:
    txt = record_text(rec)
    if any(clean_text(p) in clean_text(txt) for p in target_phrases):
        candidates.append(rec)
len(candidates)
[(rec['hadithID'], record_text(rec)[:300]) for rec in candidates]

input_full = "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ"

# inspect one
r = next(rec for rec in hadiths if rec['hadithID']==10997)

# Find top similar matn/hadithTxt
input_full = "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ"
best = []
for rec in hadiths:
    txt = record_text(rec)
    if not txt:
        continue
    matn = rec.get('Matn') or ''
    cand = matn if len(matn) > 0 else rec.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    sim = normalized_similarity(input_full, cand)
    best.append((sim, rec['hadithID'], cand))
best.sort(reverse=True)
best[:10]
